title: limnanthes douglasii subsp. douglasii
intro: Limnanthes douglasii subsp. douglasii, also known as Douglas' meadowfoam, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Limnanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in lipids and fatty acids, offering potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting cardiovascular well-being. In herbal preparations, Douglas' meadowfoam can be used as an ingredient in topical creams, salves, and ointments, as well as in dietary supplements and edible oils.
